Jefferson Territory (supreme-court-case, 1859-10-24). extralegal and unrecognized United States territory that existed from 1859 to 1861
Provisional Government of Hawaii (supreme-court-case, 1893-01-17). proclaimed after the coup d'état on January 17, 1893
United States Army Military Government in Korea (supreme-court-case, 1945-09-12). 1945–1950 US administration of southern Korea
G.I. Joe: A Real American Hero (civil-rights, 1982-01-01). American animated television series from 1983
The 10th Kingdom (civil-rights, 2000-02-27). American fantasy television miniseries
